title: EZLEAVE — Web-Based Leave Management System
impact: Automated Leave Filing, Approval, and Leave Credit Management for Bioseed Research Ph. Inc., improving efficiency and accuracy in leave management processes.
description: This is Employee Leave Management System where customized to fit the needs of the company. The used of Laravel Framework offers the security, reliability, and scalability of the project where the project can be expanded in the future to add more features and module. In this project, I used PHP for the server side programming and Bootstrap, CSS, JavaScript, and JQuery for the front-end rendering.

title: Recruitment Management System
impact: Automated Employee Hiring and Pre-employment Process for Bioseed Research Ph.
description: A web-based application that streamlines the recruitment process by allowing HR personnel to manage job postings, applications, and candidate evaluations.

title: Activity Attendance Monitoring System
impact: Automated the attendance management for company events.
description: A web-based application that allows organizations to monitor and track attendance for events and activities, providing real-time data and reports.

title: Bioseed Portalhub
impact: Provided a webpage where all relevant websites and portals for employees are listed.
description: A web-based application that serves as a centralized hub for employees to access various company portals and resources, improving accessibility and user experience.

title: Bioseed Official Website
impact: Provided maintenance and updates for the Official Website of Bioseed Research Ph.
description: A web-based application that serves as the official website for Bioseed Research Ph. Inc., providing information about the company, its products, and services.

title: Office Network Installation and Maintenance
impact: Installed and maintained the office network infrastructure, ensuring reliable connectivity and security for all employees.
description: Responsible for the installation, configuration, and maintenance of the office network infrastructure, including routers, switches, firewalls, and wireless access points. Ensured reliable connectivity and security for all employees, and provided technical support for network-related issues.
